use_cases: Displaying streaming AI-generated text responses in real-time
Rendering live chat or message content with automatic updates
Showing typewriter-style text output from language models
Presenting dynamic content that updates as it's generated
Acting as a base wrapper for AI response rendering
ai_summary: A minimal streaming text response wrapper component that wraps the Streamdown library to render AI-generated content. Designed for SaaS and dev-tools platforms, it provides real-time display of streaming text responses with full-width styling and proper margin handling for first and last child elements.
